title: Abahloli BaseYurophu Bathola INingizimu ye-Afrika
subject: History
caps_topic: Explorers from Europe find southern Africa

sources.title: Bartolomeu Dias reaches present Mossel Bay
Portuguese navigator Bartholomew Dias erects the first stone cross on the South African coast
Explorer and navigator Vasco da Gama completes his voyage round the Cape of Good Hope to India
Van Riebeeck lands at the Cape
Jan van Riebeeck, Dutch colonial administrator and first commander of the colony at the Cape of Good Hope, is born

slides.title: Abahloli BaseYurophu Bathola INingizimu ye-Afrika
slides.lead: Indlela amatilosi asePortugal nawaseNetherlands afinyelela ngayo esiphethweni se-Afrika, nokuthi uhambo lwawo olude lwalusho ukuthini kubantu ababevele behlala lapha.

media.alt: Umkhumbi wokhuni owela olwandle emagagasini aluhlaza sasibhakabhaka eceleni kogu oluluhlaza lwaseNingizimu ye-Afrika, ngaphansi kwelanga elikhanyayo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 118 q40 -10 80 0 t80 0 t80 0 t80 0 v62 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><circle cx='262' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M40 118 L64 108 h96 l24 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='108' y='58' width='4' height='60' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M112 60 q40 8 0 46 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 60 q-38 8 0 46 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Qala ngokubuza abafundi ukuthi 'umhloli' uyini nokuthi kungani abantu bakudala babengena ngemikhumbi ezilwandle ababengazazi. Beka imiqondo emikhulu emibili yalesi sifundo: (1) amatilosi asePortugal, kwabe sekulandela aseNetherlands (iHolland), athola indlela yolwandle ezungeza iNingizimu ye-Afrika, futhi (2) ukufika kwawo kwaguqula impilo yamaKhoikhoi namaSan ayevele ehlala lapha. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi 'ukuthola' indawo akusho ukuthi yayingenamuntu - abantu babehlala lapha izinkulungwane zeminyaka.

slides.title: Kungani abaseYurophu babefuna ukuwela beye eningizimu?
slides.lead: Babefuna indlela yolwandle eya kwezohwebo olucebile lwaseMpumalanga.

blocks.text: Endulo, izinongo ezinjengopelepele nesinamoni, kanye nesilika negolide, kwakufika eYurophu kuvela kude eNdiya naseMpumalanga. Kwakuhamba kancane ngasemhlabathini, ngakho kwakubiza **kakhulu**.

items: Amakhosi aseYurophu ayefuna indlela esheshayo neshibhile yokufinyelela eMpumalanga ngolwandle.
Abantu **basePortugal** banquma ukuwela beye eningizimu belandela ugu lwase-Afrika ukuze bathole leyo ndlela.
Akekho eYurophu owayesazi ukuthi imikhumbi yayingakwazi yini ukuzungeza ingezansi le-Afrika.

media.alt: Amaphakethe amancane nezimbiza zezinongo kunezinhlamvu zemali eceleni kwazo, kukhombisa izimpahla zohwebo ezibalulekile.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q10 -46 30 -46 q20 0 30 46 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><path d='M96 120 q9 -40 26 -40 q17 0 26 40 Z' fill='#b5732f'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='76' rx='18' ry='6' fill='#5c3a17'/><ellipse cx='122' cy='82' rx='16' ry='6' fill='#7a4a1f'/><circle cx='168' cy='104' r='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='184' cy='112' r='12' fill='#d18f2c'/><circle cx='176' cy='94' r='10' fill='#f0b24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yigcine iqinisile: isizathu salolu hambo oluyingozi kwakuyimali nezohwebo. Izinongo zazisetshenziselwa ukunonga nokulondoloza ukudla, futhi zaziyigugu elikhulu. Chaza ukuthi ngalesi sikhathi abaseYurophu kwakumele bathenge izimpahla zaseMpumalanga besebenzisa abahwebi abaningi, okwakuzenza zibize - indlela eqondile yolwandle yayizovumela iPortugal ukuthi izihwebele yona ngokwayo. Ungabasindi abafundi ngamagama okwamanje; abahloli beza ngokulandelayo.

slides.title: Abantu ababevele behlala lapha
slides.lead: INingizimu ye-Afrika yayiyikhaya lamaKhoikhoi namaSan kudala ngaphambi kokufika komkhumbi waseYurophu.

blocks.text: **AmaSan** ayengabazingeli nababuthi ababezingela izilwane bebuthe nezitshalo. **AmaKhoikhoi** ayefuye imihlambi yezinkomo nezimvu futhi ehamba efuna utshani obusha namanzi. Ndawonye avame ukubizwa ngokuthi **amaKhoisan**.

items: Ayehlale eNingizimu ye-Afrika izinkulungwane zeminyaka.
AmaKhoikhoi aseduze nogu ahlangana namatilosi okuqala aseYurophu ubuso nobuso.
Lo mhlaba wawuyikhaya lawo - wawungenamuntu noma ulinde 'ukutholwa'.

media.alt: Izinkomo ezimbili ezidla utshani emhlabeni oluhlaza eduze kwendlu yotshani egwababile, kukhombisa abelusi bamaKhoikhoi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M30 108 q26 -30 52 0 Z' fill='#c8a25a'/><path d='M40 108 v-12 h4 v12 Z' fill='#8a6a34'/><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='150' cy='96' rx='22' ry='12'/><rect x='134' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='160' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M130 90 q-6 -6 -2 -10' stroke='#5c3a1f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='196' cy='104' rx='16' ry='9'/><rect x='185' y='104' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='203' y='104' width='3' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sithombe sibalulekile ukuze umlando ube nobulungiswa neqiniso. Yenza kucace ukuthi abantu babehlala lapha isikhathi eside kakhulu benendlela yabo yokuphila. Hlukanisa kahle: amaSan ayengabazingeli nababuthi, amaKhoikhoi ayengabelusi abanezinkomo nezimvu. Igama elithi 'ukuthola' noma 'ukufumana' lisetshenziswa ngokombono waseYurophu; amaKhoisan ayevele ewazi lo mhlaba njengekhaya. Lokhu kulungiselela 'ukuhlangana kokuqala' kamuva.

slides.title: IPortugal ihola indlela
slides.lead: Isinyathelo nesinyathelo, amatilosi asePortugal enza amabalazwe ogu olusentshonalanga lwe-Afrika.

blocks.text: Amatilosi **asePortugal** awazange awele yonke indlela ngasikhathi sinye. Kulo lonke uhambo aya kancane phambili ngaseningizimu ogwini lwase-Afrika bese ebuyela ekhaya ukuze abelane ngalokho ayekufundile.

items: Ayewela ngemikhumbi eqinile yokhuni ebizwa ngokuthi **ama-caravel** eyayikwazi ukuwela imelene nomoya.
Umkhaphiteni ngamunye wayengeza ugu olusha emabalazweni asePortugal.
Umgomo wabo wawusengowokuthola isiphetho esikude se-Afrika bese beqhubeka bewela beya eMpumalanga.

media.alt: Umkhumbi we-caravel onezinsika ezintathu nezinseyili ezimhlophe ezigcwele olwandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='220' height='42' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M46 118 L70 106 h84 l22 12 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'><line x1='78' y1='40' x2='78' y2='106'/><line x1='112' y1='30' x2='112' y2='106'/><line x1='146' y1='44' x2='146' y2='106'/></g><path d='M80 44 q26 6 0 40 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M114 34 q30 8 0 48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M148 48 q22 6 0 36 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='16' height='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuthi ukuhlola kwakuyinqubo ehamba kancane, enokunakekela, isinyathelo nesinyathelo eminyakeni eminingi, hhayi uhambo olulodwa. Yethula i-caravel: umkhumbi olula, osheshayo owawukwazi ukuwela umelene nomoya, okwenza uhambo olude lolwandle lwenzeke. Gcina amagama emalula lapha - abakhaphiteni ababili abadumile (uDias noda Gama) bathola izithombe zabo ngokulandelayo.

slides.title: Ukuthola indlela olwandle
slides.lead: Ngaphandle kwamabalazwe olwandle oluvulekile, amatilosi asebenzisa ilanga, izinkanyezi namathuluzi alula.

blocks.text: Kude olwandle azikho izindlela noma iziqondiso zendlela. Abahloli basebenzisa **ikhampasi** ukuthola inyakatho, futhi babuka **ilanga nezinkanyezi** ukuze bathole ukuthi bakuphi.

items: Ithuluzi elibizwa ngokuthi **i-astrolabe** lalisiza ukukala ukuthi ilanga noma inkanyezi iphakeme kangakanani esibhakabhakeni.
AmaPortugal atshala iziphambano ezinkulu zamatshe, ezibizwa ngokuthi **ama-padrao**, ogwini ukuphawula ukuthi afinyelele kude kangakanani.
Uhambo lwalulokhu luyingozi - iziphepho, indlala nokugula kwakungabahlasela bekude nekhaya.

media.alt: Ikhampasi eyindilinga ekhombisa inyakatho, eceleni kwesiphambano eside setshe esitshalwe ogwini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='72' cy='80' r='40' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M72 46 L82 80 L72 114 L62 80 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M72 80 L82 80' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'/><text x='72' y='40' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3f26'>N</text><rect x='150' y='40' width='10' height='84' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='134' y='58' width='42' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='128' y='120' width='54' height='14' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi yisithombe esibambekayo, esinelukuluku - abafundi beBanga 6 bayakuthanda 'ukuthi kanjani'. Chaza kalula ukuthi inaliti yekhampasi njalo ikhomba inyakatho, nokuthi ukuphakama kwelanga noma izinkanyezi kwakutshela amatilosi ukuthi asenyakatho noma eningizimu kangakanani. Yethula i-'padrao' (isiphambano setshe) ngoba uDias watshala esisodwa futhi sivela esithombeni esilandelayo. Gcizelela ingozi yangempela ukuze kwakheke inhlonipho ngokuthi lezi zohambo zazinzima kangakanani.

slides.title: UBartolomeu Dias uzungeza iCape
slides.lead: Ngo-1488 umkhaphiteni wasePortugal waba ngowokuqala waseYurophu owaziwayo ngokuzungeza isiphetho se-Afrika.

blocks.text: **UBartolomeu Dias** wawela waya kude kakhulu eningizimu kwaze kwathi isiphepho saphephetha imikhumbi yakhe sayizungeza ingezansi le-Afrika ngaphandle kokuthi abone ngisho umhlaba. Wayeseyizungezile **iCape**, ekhombisa ukuthi imikhumbi yayingafinyelela eMpumalanga ngolwandle.

items: Wehlela eMossel Bay watshala isiphambano setshe ogwini.
Ekuqaleni wayibiza le ndawo ngokuthi 'iCape Yeziphepho' ngenxa yesimo sezulu esinolaka.
INkosi yasePortugal yayiqamba kabusha ngokuthi **iCape of Good Hope** (iCape Yethemba Elihle), ngoba manje kwase kunethemba lokufinyelela eNdiya.

media.alt: Umkhumbi osunduzwa umoya onamandla namagagasi uzungeza icape elinamatshe, kunesiphambano setshe enhlokweni yezwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='50' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 110 q30 -14 60 0 t60 0 t60 0 t60 0 v50 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><path d='M150 110 q40 -30 90 -20 v20 Z' fill='#6b6152'/><rect x='196' y='58' width='7' height='34' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='186' y='68' width='27' height='7' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M48 108 L68 98 h44 l16 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><line x1='84' y1='60' x2='84' y2='98' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M86 62 q30 8 0 34 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 40 q30 8 60 2' stroke='#9aa77f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lolu ngolunye lwezohambo ezimbili ezibalulekile zalesi sifundo. Gcizelela u-1488 nombono 'wowokuqala' ngokombhalo waseYurophu. Xoxa indaba kalula: isiphepho saphephetha uDias sayozungeza iCape cishe ngengozi, okwafakazela ukuthi indlela yolwandle yayingenzeka. Ukushintshwa kwegama kusukela ku-'Cape Yeziphepho' kuya ku-'Cape of Good Hope' kuwumniningwane okhumbulekayo - buza abafundi ukuthi kungani 'ithemba elihle' laliyigama elihle. [SME] Sicela uqinisekise amagama okuthi uDias wehlela eMossel Bay nokuqanjwa kweCape ngokwesihloko se-SAHO ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa.

slides.title: UVasco da Gama ufinyelela eNdiya
slides.lead: Cishe eminyakeni eyishumi kamuva, omunye umkhaphiteni wasePortugal wawela yonke indlela waya eNdiya wabuya.

blocks.text: **UVasco da Gama** waqala uhambo ngo-1497. Imikhumbi yakhe yema ogwini lwaseNingizimu ye-Afrika ukuze ithole amanzi ahlanzekile nokuphumula, yabe iseyenyuka ogwini lwasempumalanga yawela yaya **eNdiya**, ayifinyelela ngo-1498.

items: Waqamba ugu olusempumalanga ngokuthi **iNatal**, ngoba wadlula kulo eduze kukaKhisimusi.
Wavula indlela yolwandle epheleleyo esuka eYurophu iya eMpumalanga.
Manje imikhumbi yasePortugal yayidlula eCape kaningi lapho iya khona ukuyohweba.

media.alt: Ibalazwe elilula elikhombisa indlela yokuwela enamachashazi esuka eYurophu yehle izungeze i-Afrika iwele iye eNdiya.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M70 20 q-16 40 8 70 q18 22 0 46 q-6 12 14 12 q26 0 30 -22' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 24 q22 30 6 66 q-10 22 8 40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 26 C40 60 70 96 78 120 C82 138 120 138 150 120' fill='none' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><circle cx='60' cy='26' r='5' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='120' r='5' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='60' y='16' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>Portugal</text><text x='176' y='118' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>India</text></svg>

slides.notes: Uhambo lwesibili olubalulekile. UDa Gama waqeda lokho uDias ayekuqalile: indlela yolwandle evulekile eya eNdiya. Khombisa ebalazweni ukuthi indlela ihamba iseduze nogu lwase-Afrika futhi izungeze iCape. Chaza ukuthi 'iNatal' isho okuhambisana nokuzalwa/uKhisimusi, yingakho wayisebenzisa eduze ko-25 kaZibandlela. Emva kwalokhu, iCape yaba yindawo evamile yokuma yemikhumbi edlulayo - okuholela kumaDutch. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuqanjwa kweNatal nezinsuku zika-1497-1498 ngokwe-SAHO ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa.

slides.title: Ukuhlangana eCape
slides.lead: Lapho amatilosi namaKhoikhoi ehlangana, kwakukhona kokubili ukuhweba futhi, ngezinye izikhathi, ukungqubuzana.

blocks.text: Imikhumbi edlulayo yayidinga amanzi ahlanzekile, inyama nokuphumula. Amatilosi ngezinye izikhathi **ayehweba** insimbi nobuhlalu namaKhoikhoi ukuze athole izinkomo nezimvu. Kodwa izinhlangothi zombili zazingakhulumi ulimi olufanayo, futhi ukungezwani kwakungaba yingozi.

items: Ukuhweba kwasiza amatilosi akhathele ukuthi athole ukudla okuhlanzekile kohambo olude.
Ngo-1510 kwaqubuka ukulwa eTable Bay futhi umholi wasePortugal namadoda akhe amaningi babulawa.
Iminyaka eminingi emva kwalokho, iningi lemikhumbi yasePortugal lakhetha ukungami eCape.

media.alt: Amaqembu amabili abantu abhekene ebhishi, elinye liseceleni kwesikebhe, eshintshiselana izimpahla.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='100' width='240' height='18' fill='#3a6b8a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='70' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='98' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='91' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='160' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='153' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='188' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='181' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><rect x='118' y='86' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M206 100 q16 -6 30 0 v10 h-30 Z' fill='#5c3f26'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha lokhu ngobunono nangeqiniso ezingeni leBanga 6. Ukuhlangana kwakunezinhlangothi ezimbili: ukuhweba ngokuthula KANYE nokungqubuzana. Ukungqubuzana kuka-1510 eTable Bay (lapho kwafa khona iViceroy yasePortugal uFrancisco de Almeida namadoda amaningi) yikho okwenza amaPortugal agwema kakhulu iCape ngemva kwalokho. Gwema ukusola uhlangothi olulodwa; chaza ukuthi ukungabikho kolimi olufanayo namasiko ahlukene kwenza ukwethembana kube nzima. [SME] Sicela uqinisekise umcimbi weTable Bay ka-1510, ubunikazi bomholi, namagama abalimele ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa - kugcine kufanele iminyaka.

slides.title: AmaDutch neVOC
slides.lead: Ngemva kweminyaka engaphezu kwekhulu, abahwebi baseNetherlands babedinga indawo yokuma phakathi nendlela eya eMpumalanga.

blocks.text: I-**Dutch East India Company**, eyaziwa ngezinhlamvu zayo zesiDutch elithi **VOC**, yathumela imikhumbi eminingi phakathi kweYurophu neMpumalanga. ICape yayibekwe phakathi nendawo yalolo hambo olude.

items: Amatilosi asezohambeni olude ngokuvamile ayegula ngenxa yokungabi khona kokudla okuhlanzekile namanzi.
IVOC yayifuna **isiteshi sokuvuselela** eCape ukuze itshale imifino ithole inyama ehlanzekile.
Ngakho iNkampani yanquma ukuthumela abantu ukuze bakhe isisekelo eTable Bay.

media.alt: Ifulegi lomkhumbi wokuhweba eceleni kwamabhokisi namagabha, kukhombisa indawo yohwebo yenkampani.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='30' width='6' height='100' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M46 32 h60 v34 h-60 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='76' y='55' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c1414'>VOC</text><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='120' y='96' width='36' height='34'/><rect x='158' y='104' width='30' height='26'/></g><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'><line x1='120' y1='113' x2='156' y2='113'/><line x1='138' y1='96' x2='138' y2='130'/></g><ellipse cx='176' cy='104' rx='15' ry='6' fill='#8a6a34'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ibhuloho elisuka kumaPortugal liye kumaDutch. Gcizelela isizathu: iVOC yayiyinkampani enkulu yohwebo eyayithatha izinyanga imikhumbi yayo ukuze ifinyelele eMpumalanga, futhi amatilosi ayegula (ngokuvamile ngenxa yesifo esibizwa nge-scurvy, esibangelwa ukweswela ukudla okuhlanzekile). Isiteshi sokuvuselela 'esiphakathi nendlela' eCape sasizohlinzeka ngemifino ehlanzekile, amanzi nenyama. Yilesi isizathu esenza amaDutch afika - ukuhweba nokuhlinzeka, hhayi ekuqaleni ukwakha izwe.

slides.title: UJan van Riebeeck eCape
slides.lead: Ngo-1652 iVOC yathumela uJan van Riebeeck ukuze amise isiteshi sokuvuselela.

blocks.text: **UJan van Riebeeck** wafika eTable Bay ngo-Ephreli 1652 neqembu elincane labantu. Bakha inqaba ukuze bavikeleke batshala nengadi enkulu yemifino ukuze bondle imikhumbi edlulayo.

items: Batshala imifino nezithelo bafuya nezilwane ukuze bathole inyama ehlanzekile.
Bahweba namaKhoikhoi ukuze bathole izinkomo nezimvu.
Lesi siteshi esincane sakhula kancane - saba yisiqalo sokuhlala kwaseYurophu okuhlala njalo.

media.alt: Inqaba emise okwenkanyezi eceleni kwemigqa ehlelekile yengadi yemifino ngezansi kwentaba enesihloko esiyisicaba.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 60 h120 l16 -22 h44 v42 H20 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='3'><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='150' y2='108'/><line x1='30' y1='122' x2='150' y2='122'/><line x1='30' y1='136' x2='150' y2='136'/></g><path d='M176 104 l14 -8 l14 8 l-4 22 h-20 Z' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a34' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='186' y='114' width='8' height='12' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lokhu kuyisiphetho esiguqukayo sengxenye yesibili yesifundo. UVan Riebeeck wafika ngo-Ephreli 1652 nabantu abangaba ngamashumi ayisishiyagalolunye; bakha inqaba neNgadi yeNkampani ukuze bahlinzeke imikhumbi. Gcizelela amazwi athi 'ukuhlala okuhlala njalo' - ngokungafani namaPortugal ayemane ame, amaDutch ahlala. Yilokho kuhlala njalo okwenza u-1652 ubaluleke kangaka futhi kuholele emiphumeleni esithombeni esilandelayo. [SME] Qinisekisa inyanga yokufika nobungako obucishe bube yiqembu likavan Riebeeck (ngokuvamile okushiwo ukuthi lalicishe libe ngu-90) ngaphambi kokukhiqizwa.

slides.title: Ushintsho kubantu baseCape
slides.lead: Indawo entsha yokuhlala yathatha kancane umhlaba namadlelo amaKhoikhoi ayethembele kuwo.

blocks.text: Ekuqaleni amaDutch namaKhoikhoi ayehwebelana. Kodwa njengoba indawo yokuhlala ikhula, amaDutch ayefuna **umhlaba omningi** wamapulazi - wona kanye umhlaba amaKhoikhoi ayewusebenzisela ukwelusa izinkomo zawo.

items: AmaKhoikhoi alahlekelwa amadlelo futhi, ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, izinkomo zawo eziningi.
Ukungezwani ngomhlaba nezinkomo kwaholela ekulweni phakathi kwezinhlangothi zombili.
Impilo yamaKhoikhoi namaSan yaguqulwa unomphela indawo yokuhlala eseCape.

media.alt: Ucingo oluhlukanisa amadlelo aluhlaza, kunezinkomo ohlangothini olulodwa nendlu yasepulazini kolunye.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#6b6152' stroke-width='3'><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='120' y2='150'/><line x1='104' y1='84' x2='136' y2='84'/><line x1='104' y1='104' x2='136' y2='104'/></g><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='56' cy='112' rx='18' ry='9'/><rect x='44' y='112' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='66' y='112' width='3' height='12'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='168' y='96' width='40' height='30'/></g><path d='M166 96 l22 -16 l22 16 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Letha umphumela oyinhloko ngokucacile nangokulinganayo. Ubudlelwano baqala ngokuhweba kodwa bashintsha njengoba abahlali babefuna umhlaba wokulima - kanye lawo madlelo amaKhoikhoi ayewadinga emihlanjini yawo. Lokhu kwaholela ekulahlekelweni umhlaba, ukulahlekelwa izinkomo, nokungqubuzana. Kugcine kuyiqiniso futhi kufanele iminyaka; iphuzu ukuthi ukufika kwendawo yokuhlala kwaguqula unomphela impilo yamaKhoikhoi namaSan. Lokhu kuxhumana nezihloko ze-CAPS zakamuva ngokuthathwa kweCape njengekoloni.

slides.title: Izinsuku ezibalulekile: 1488 kuya ku-1652

blocks.alt: Uhlelo lwesikhathi olusuka ku-1488 kuya ku-1652 olukhombisa uDias ezungeza iCape, uda Gama efinyelela eNdiya, ukungqubuzana kuka-1510 eTable Bay, noVan Riebeeck efika ngo-1652.

events.label: UVasco da Gama uqhubeka eya eNdiya
Imikhumbi yeVOC yamaDutch idlula eCape kaningi

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lesi sithombe ukusiza abafundi ukuhlela imicimbi ngokulandelana, ikhono elibalulekile le-CAPS leSigaba Esimaphakathi. Bacele baqaphele igebe elide phakathi kohambo lokuqala lwamaPortugal (ngasekupheleni kwawo-1400) nokuhlala kwamaDutch (1652) - iminyaka engaphezu kuka-150. AmaPortugal athola futhi asebenzisa indlela yolwandle; amaDutch yiwo agcina ehlala eCape.

slides.title: Izinhlangothi ezimbili zendaba efanayo
slides.lead: Uhambo olufanayo lubukeka luhluke kakhulu kuye ngokuthi ungubani.

items: Kwavulwa indlela yolwandle eya ecebeni laseMpumalanga.
Ukuhweba nemikhumbi kwakhula, futhi iCape yaba yindawo ebalulekile yokuma.
AmaDutch akha isisekelo esihlalayo esiphethweni se-Afrika.
Izihambi zafika emhlabeni owawuvele uyikhaya lawo.
Alahlekelwa amadlelo nezinkomo njengoba indawo yokuhlala ikhula.
Indlela yawo yokuphila yaguqulwa unomphela.

slides.notes: Lesi yisithombe sokucabanga. Fundisa 'umbono' - umlando ofanayo uzwakala njengempumelelo ejabulisayo ngasohlangothini lweYurophu nanjengokulahlekelwa ngasohlangothini lwamaKhoisan. Khuthaza abafundi ukuthi babambe amaqiniso omabili ngasikhathi sinye. Lokhu kubonisa ukucabanga komlando okulinganisiweyo futhi kubalungiselela imibuzo yokubukeza.

slides.title: Esikufundile
slides.lead: Amatilosi asePortugal athola indlela yolwandle ezungeza iNingizimu ye-Afrika, kwathi amaDutch kamuva ahlala eCape - eguqula impilo yamaKhoisan.

blocks.text: Khumbula indaba: abaseYurophu babefuna indlela yolwandle eya eMpumalanga; **uDias** wazungeza iCape ngo-1488 kwathi **uda Gama** wafinyelela eNdiya ngo-1498; kwathi ngo-**1652 uvan Riebeeck** wakha isiteshi sokuvuselela esakhula saba yindawo yokuhlala ehlalayo.

blocks.question: Kungani amaPortugal ayefuna ukuzungeza isiphetho se-Afrika?
Bala abahloli ababili abadumile basePortugal kulesi sifundo bese usho ukuthi ngamunye wenzeni.
Ukufika kwendawo yokuhlala yamaDutch eCape kwayiguqula kanjani impilo yamaKhoikhoi?

slides.notes: Phetha ngokuphinda ukhulume ngezikhathi ezintathu ezibalulekile: uDias (1488), uda Gama (1497-98) noVan Riebeeck (1652). Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo yekilasi; amamaki alandela isitayela se-CAPS. Umbuzo wokugcina uhlola ukuthi abafundi bangakwazi yini ukuchaza umphumela, hhayi nje ukukhumbula iqiniso. Bheka phambili kuyunithi elandelayo: ukuthathwa kweCape njengekoloni ngekhulu le-17 nele-18.
